no issues or errors are present.\n- **Malicious behavior:** None of the reports identify any malicious code, backdoors, or suspicious logic.\n- **Obfuscation:** All reports agree the code is straightforward and not obfuscated.\n- **Security risks:** The overall security risk is minimal, with scores around 0.1 or 0, indicating negligible concern.\n\n---\n\n### Issue-by-issue analysis:\n\n#### **Report 1**\n- **Purpose & sources:** Standard factory for ERC20, no issues.\n- **Sinks & flows:** Typical contract interaction;
